---
name: Climbing Games / Beta Scoring Platform
about: Feature request for climbing games and route beta scoring
title: "Add climbing games with coach routes and beta scoring"
labels: "enhancement"
---

## Description

Add a **climbing games** feature where:

1. **Coach-to-Athlete Mode:** A coach can create/send climbing routes to athletes who solve them and plan the beta (movement sequence).

2. **Community Beta Scoring:** A platform where community members can submit climbing routes and other users can attempt to plan the optimal beta. Submissions are scored against each other based on:
   - Efficiency of movement sequence
   - Number of moves
   - Difficulty assessment
   - User-submitted beta solutions

## Use Cases

- Coaches guide their climbers through curated routes and movements
- Athletes compete with each other's beta solutions
- Community discovers optimized climbing strategies
- Leaderboards for best beta solvers

## Related Features

- Route planner (v1.2.0) with normalized coordinates and hold detection (v1.3.0)
- Planning of move sequences and limb placement

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Interface to create/share routes with athletes
- [ ] Beta planning and submission system
- [ ] Scoring/comparison mechanism for multiple beta solutions
- [ ] Community route submission and discovery

## Out of Scope

- Real-time multiplayer climbing
